headlines.title: Supreme Court allows abortion pill to remain available by mail nationwide
headlines.description: The Supreme Court ensured that the abortion pill, mifepristone, can continue to be available by mail without an in-person meeting with a clinician.

headlines.title: South Carolina governor calls for a special session on redistricting
headlines.description: Republicans hope to eliminate a majority-minority seat held by longtime Democratic Rep. Jim Clyburn before the November midterm elections.

headlines.title: Republicans grapple with how much to have Trump on the campaign trail for the midterms
headlines.description: Trump’s approval rating is sinking amid high prices and the war with Iran, but he’s still the best at turning out the base voters Republicans need for the midterms.

headlines.title: Families caring for disabled relatives face unthinkable choices as Medicaid cuts loom
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s Medicaid cuts and emerging attacks on paid family caregiving have people fearing financial ruin as they fight to keep loved ones out of institutions.

headlines.title: Trump Wraps China Summit With Xi Jinping: What Are the Results?
headlines.description: President Donald Trump is concluding his high-stakes visit to China and is already declaring it a success. The summit’s results so far are still unclear with no announcements of any new trade deals or purchases of American products. Trump suggested that airplane maker Boeing struck a deal to sell more aircrafts to Chinese companies, but offered few details. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports and moderator of Meet the Press Kristin Welker joins TODAY with analysis.

headlines.title: Xi gives Trump rare tour of secret garden at heart of Chinese government
headlines.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping gave President Trump a rare, private tour of Beijing’s walled-off Zhongnanhai compound during the two-day summit. A hot mic captured Trump asking Xi if other foreign leaders were also received in the compound.

headlines.title: Trump departs China after two-day summit
headlines.description: President Trump wrapped up his two-day visit to China with a red carpet and honor guard before boarding Air Force One in Beijing. A group of children holding American and Chinese flags chanted “farewell, farewell, a warm farewell” as Trump greeted dignitaries there to see him off.

headlines.title: The war is on hold, but Iran’s internal crackdown is only deepening
headlines.description: While the Iranian regime has been battling its external enemies, Israel and the U.S., it has also been ramping up a deadly crackdown on those seen as the enemy within.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.

headlines.title: Free primary care for all: Democratic think tank pushes the party on new health policy
headlines.description: As Democrats look for a viable healthcare message ahead of the midterm elections, one well-connected think tank is pushing the party to embrace a new idea: free primary care for all Americans

headlines.title: Read the full transcript: Secretary of State Marco Rubio interviewed by ‘NBC Nightly News’ anchor Tom Llamas
headlines.description: Rubio spoke about Iran, Taiwan, Cuba and more during President Donald Trump’s trip to Beijing for a high-stakes summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping.
